versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install istio-base oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istio-base:1.30.1" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install istiod oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istiod:1.30.1" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install istio-gateway oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istio-gateway:1.30.1" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   istio-base-1-30-1               true
# kcm-system   istiod-1-30-1                   true
# kcm-system   istio-gateway-1-30-1            true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: istio
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: istio-base-1-30-1
      name: istio-base
      namespace: istio-system
    - template: istiod-1-30-1
      name: istiod
      namespace: istio-system
      dependsOn:
      - name: istio-base
        namespace: istio-system
    - template: istio-gateway-1-30-1
      name: istio-gateway
      namespace: istio-system
      dependsOn:
      - name: istiod
        namespace: istio-system
